# Issue Report

<!--
Thank you for taking the time to report an issue!

Please fill out the sections below. The more information you provide, the easier it will be to diagnose and fix the issue.
-->

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the issue is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

<!--
Please provide detailed steps to reproduce the issue:

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three
...

If possible, provide a minimal code example that reproduces the issue.
-->

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should happen? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happens? -->

## Environment

<!-- Please provide the following information: -->

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.12.0]
- **chatguru Agent Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **uv Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g., 20.10.0] (if frontend-related)

## Configuration

<!--
If relevant, provide your configuration (redact sensitive information):

```bash
# Relevant environment variables (redact API keys!)
LLM_ENDPOINT=https://...
LLM_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=gpt-4o-mini
# etc.
```
-->

## Logs/Error Messages

<!--
If applicable, provide relevant logs or error messages:

```
Error message here
Stack trace here
```
-->

## Additional Context

<!--
Add any other context about the problem here:
- Screenshots (if applicable)
- Related issues
- Possible solutions you've considered
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have checked the documentation
- [ ] I have provided all relevant information
- [ ] I have redacted sensitive information (API keys, etc.)
